emergency_routing_rules: Try primary at 555-5000. If no answer, try backup at 555-5001.
call_transfer_rules: 20s on primary, 20s on backup. If both fail, apologize and say we are paging the team urgently.
integration_constraints: Do not use or reference ServiceTitan.
after_hours_flow_summary: Greet -> Purpose -> Emergency Check -> Route (Transfer/Message) -> Close.
office_hours_flow_summary: Greet -> Purpose -> Collect Info -> Transfer to office.
